description: Modello minimale per illustrare i concetti base: tupla, DSL, gerarchia via parent.
dsl:
model
  schema 1.1

type user

type course
  relations
    define editor: [user]
    define can_edit: editor

type lesson
  relations
    define parent: [course]
    define editor: [user]
    define can_edit: editor or editor from parent
